Who We Are

Empowering Students
to Reach Further

10+ Years of Excellence

At Almo Overseas, we believe that the right education can transform lives. We guide students through every stage of their international education journey — from choosing the perfect course and university to visa assistance and pre-departure support.

Our team of experienced education counsellors has helped hundreds of students secure places at prestigious universities across the UK, USA, Canada, Australia, and Europe. We are passionate about matching each student with the right opportunity.

🎓
Expert Guidance Personalised advice from certified counsellors
🤝
Trusted Partners Direct ties with 200+ universities
✈️
End-to-End Support From application to landing abroad
🏆
Proven Results 98% visa approval track record

What We Offer

Comprehensive Study
Abroad Services

01

University Admissions

Expert guidance on selecting the right course and university, crafting compelling personal statements, and submitting strong applications.

02

Visa Assistance

Complete support with student visa applications — documentation, interview preparation, and a 98% approval success rate across all destinations.

03
💰

Scholarships & Funding

We identify and help you apply for scholarships, bursaries, and funding opportunities to make your international education more affordable.

04

Test Preparation

Guidance and resources for IELTS, TOEFL, GRE, GMAT, and SAT — ensuring you meet the language and academic requirements of your chosen university.

05

Accommodation Support

Assistance finding safe, affordable student accommodation — on-campus or private — so you feel at home from day one.

06

Pre-Departure Briefing

Comprehensive orientation covering culture, travel, banking, healthcare, and everything else you need to confidently begin your international life.

Why Choose Almo

Numbers That Speak
For Themselves

How It Works

Your Journey in
Five Simple Steps

From your first consultation to landing at your university — we are with you every step of the way.

1

Free Consultation

Meet with our counsellors to discuss your academic goals, budget, and preferred destinations.

2

Course & University Selection

We shortlist the best courses and institutions tailored to your profile and aspirations.

3

Application Support

We help craft your application documents, personal statement, and references for the best outcome.

4

Visa & Documentation

Our visa experts prepare and review all your documentation for a successful application.

5

Pre-Departure & Arrival

We brief you on everything — from travel and accommodation to your first day on campus.

Student Stories

Words From Our
Students

★★★★★
"

I had no idea where to start with applying abroad, but Almo Overseas handled everything — from shortlisting universities to preparing my visa documents. I got my offer from the University of Manchester within 3 weeks. Truly life-changing service!

MSc Data Science · University of Manchester, UK
★★★★★
"

The counsellors at Almo are genuinely passionate about your future. They helped me craft a strong personal statement and prepared me thoroughly for my visa interview. I'm now living my dream in Canada — I couldn't have done it without them.

BEng Computer Engineering · University of Toronto, Canada
★★★★★
"

Almo Overseas found me a partial scholarship I didn't even know I was eligible for. Their knowledge of international funding is exceptional. I saved thousands in tuition fees and my visa was approved first time. Highly recommend to anyone serious about studying abroad.

Priya Rao
MBA · University of Melbourne, Australia
★★★★★
"

From the very first consultation, the team made me feel confident and supported. They guided me through every step — IELTS prep advice, SOP writing, and accommodation search. My student visa for the UK came through in just 2 weeks!

BSc Business Management · University of Birmingham, UK
★★★★★
"

I applied to 5 universities and got offers from 4 of them — all thanks to Almo Overseas. Their expertise in applications and documentation is unmatched. The team was always available to answer my questions, even late in the evening. Outstanding support!

MSc International Relations · University of Edinburgh, UK
★★★★★
"

Almo Overseas is the real deal. Professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely caring. They helped me navigate the complex US student visa process and I received my F-1 visa without any issues. Now completing my Masters at a top 50 US university. Forever grateful!
